name: Maxine Waters
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $110,534 for Maxine Waters in U.S. House, CA-43. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
